body_excerpt: In onCreate of RequestManageCredentials.java, there is a possible way for a third party app to install certificates without user approval due to a tapjacking/overlay attack. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with User execution privileges needed. User interaction is needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
